description: Install npm dependencies and verify the existing test suite and cdk synth pass as a baseline before making changes.
steps: Run `npm install` in /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-ts-kiro to install all dependencies
Run `npm test` to confirm the existing 9 tests pass
Run `npx cdk synth` to confirm CloudFormation template synthesizes cleanly
acceptance_criteria: All existing tests pass (9 tests in test/cdk-base.test.ts)
npx cdk synth produces a valid CloudFormation template without errors
verification: npx cdk synth exits with code 0
findings: All verification passed. Note: there are actually 10 tests (not 9 as originally estimated) in test/cdk-base.test.ts. npm install produces deprecation warnings for glob/inflight but completes successfully. NODE_OPTIONS env var must be unset (NODE_OPTIONS="") before running npm/npx commands due to a missing proxy-bootstrap.js preload module. ts-jest emits a warning about hybrid module kind requiring isolatedModules:true but tests pass regardless. cdk synth produces a valid CloudFormation template with S3 buckets, EventBridge rule, Lambda placeholder, and associated IAM roles.
